name: io.github.codeofaxel/kiln
title: Kiln
description: Kiln MCP server for agents: design, slice, print, monitor, and recover physical objects safely.

environmentVariables.name: KILN_PRINTER_HOST
environmentVariables.description: URL of your 3D printer (OctoPrint, Moonraker, Creality, or Prusa Link)

environmentVariables.name: KILN_PRINTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for your printer's REST API

environmentVariables.name: KILN_PRINTER_TYPE
environmentVariables.description: Printer type: octoprint, moonraker, creality, bambu, prusalink, elegoo, or serial
